recommended_overlap_notes: Gaujoux/Gut anti-TNF Crohn blood validation cohort. GEO and the linked paper state 22 Crohn patients had baseline PBMC/whole-blood expression before first infliximab, with W14 response labels. Public sample IDs are HR-* and no public evidence links these subjects to DS061/DS062/DS063/DS064/DS088 mucosal anti-TNF rows. Count as an independent blood validation cohort unless future controlled/source metadata shows reuse.

Zhengzhou UC intestinal-biopsy proteomics cohort. PRIDE and publication describe 12 UC patients: IFX responders, IFX non-responders, severe UC without IFX history, and mild UC without IFX history. The paper uses public GEO transcriptomic cohorts for validation, but public records do not show subject/sample overlap with DS061/DS062/DS063/DS088/DS106. Count as an independent proteomics cohort; note small n and mixed IFX/severity design.

Prospective Leuven TREM1 anti-TNF mucosal RNA-seq cohort. BioStudies/SDRF list 44 adult IBD ulcer-edge samples, infliximab or adalimumab, colon/ileum, responder/non-responder, with GC*.count sample names and ERR3079558-ERR3079601 runs. Same broad Leuven/TARGID environment as DS061/DS063/DS088, but public metadata show a later RNA-seq cohort with different sample IDs/platform and no direct subject crosswalk. Count as likely independent, with residual uncertainty because public subject IDs are not exposed.
